# Ether Property Hub

> Australia's 5-star rated buyer's agency. Unmatched price outcomes and access to off-market properties across Australia.

## About

Ether Property Hub is an independent buyer's agency led by Amir Thapa Magaranti (Director & Buyer's Agent). We help first-home buyers, interstate and international buyers, and property investors make smarter, faster, and more confident purchasing decisions.

- Website: https://etherpropertyhub.com.au
- Email: amir@etherpropertyhub.com.au
- Phone: 0452 633 252
- Office: 60 Mooramba Ave, North Gosford, NSW 2250
- Licence: NSW 400086989
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61564510874915
- Instagram: @etherpropertyhub
- TikTok: @amiretherpropertyhub

## Key facts

- Over 65% of client purchases are never publicly advertised (off-market access)
- Australia-wide coverage: NSW, QLD, VIC, WA and beyond
- Buyer-only representation — no vendor conflicts of interest
- Free consultation / discovery call available

## Services

- Investment Strategy
- Property Research
- Property Sourcing
- Off-Market Access
- Due Diligence
- Negotiation & Auctions

## Who we help

- Family home buyers
- Interstate & international buyers (sight-unseen purchases)
- Property investors building portfolios

## Recent client purchases

Dubbo NSW, Caboolture QLD, Fortitude Valley QLD, Kallangur QLD, Thornlie WA, Greenfields WA, Mildura VIC
